taco-hand-pies.name: Taco Hand Pies
instructions: Preheat the oven to 218°C (220 degrees C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Mix together tomatoes, onion, cilantro, jalapeño pepper, and garlic salt in a large bowl until well combined. Set aside.
Heat a sauté pan over medium-high heat. Cook and stir beef in the hot pan until crumbly and no longer pink, 5 to 7 minutes. Drain fat and return beef to the pan.
Stir water and taco seasoning into beef; cook until fully incorporated and water has been absorbed, 2 to 3 minutes. Mix in tomato mixture and pepper Jack cheese until well combined.

Lightly flour a work surface. Roll each empanada wrapper out to a 6-inch circle. Scoop 1/3 cup beef filling onto the center of each wrapper. Fold each wrapper in half to enclose beef filling. Crimp the edges with a fork to seal. Pierce the top of each pie twice with a fork. Transfer to the prepared baking sheet.
Make egg wash: Whisk together egg and water in a small bowl until well combined. Brush over the tops of pies.
Bake on the middle rack in the preheated oven until golden brown, about 20 minutes.

tads-roasted-potatoes.name: Tad's Roasted Potatoes

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Preheat oven to 375°. Place herbs, garlic, potatoes, and oil in a large bowl; season with salt and pepper and toss to coat. Divide between 2 large rimmed baking sheets and roast, tossing occasionally, until potatoes are soft and golden brown, 45–55 minutes.

tagliatelle-with-salmon-and-watercress-t.name: Tagliatelle With Salmon And Watercress
instructions: Light a pot with the water and the salt spoon and let it boil. Add the tagliatelle and let it cook for 3 minutes. Drain and reserve 200 ml of water.

Heat half the olive oil in a large non-stick pan. Season the salmon loins with the remaining salt and some mill pepper. Lay them in the pan and praise them for about two minutes on each side. Remove from the skillet and reserve.
Book a handful of cress leaves. Place the rest in the blender cup, add the bechamel and broth of the dough you have reserved and crush. Reserve.

Lay the rest of the oil on the same frying pan where the salmon stained. Add the chopped shallots and let it shine in medium heat, stirring from time to time. Add the cress sauce and mix well. When boiling, add the batter, wrap well and remove from the fire.
Have the dough in a serving container. Add the chipped salmon and the remaining cress leaves and serve immediately.

talamee.name: Talamee
instructions: Dissolve sugar in about 1 cup of the water. Sprinkle the yeast over the top. Let stand for about 10 minutes, until foamy.

In a large bowl, mix together the yeast mixture, water, oil, and about half of the flour until well blended. Gradually mix in the rest of the flour until the dough is stiff enough to take out of the bowl. Knead on a floured surface until smooth and elastic, about 10 minutes. Place dough in a greased bowl, and cover with a cloth. allow to rise in a warm place until doubled in size. This will take 1 to 2 hours.
Divide dough into sections about the size of a grapefruit. Form into smooth balls, cover with a cloth, and let rise again for about 30 minutes.

On a lightly floured surface, flatten each ball to 1/2 inch thickness, pressing out with your fingers. Circles should be about 8 inches across. Place on an oiled baking sheet. Let rest for about 10 minutes, or while you preheat the oven .
Preheat the oven to 232°C (230 degrees C).
Bake rounds until the top is lightly browned, 10 to 12 minutes. Remove from the oven, and brush with melted butter. Repeat with remaining bread.

tamarind-vinaigrette.name: Tamarind Vinaigrette
instructions: Combine rice vinegar, tamarind concentrate, maple syrup, shallot, salt, and pepper in the bowl of a small food processor or blender. Pulse to combine.
With the unit running, stream in the oil a bit at a time, until thoroughly emulsified.

tarte-au-camembert-french-cheese-tart.name: Tarte Au Camembert (french Cheese Tart)

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Preheat the oven to 218°C (220 degrees C).
Beat eggs in a medium bowl; add heavy cream, green onions, salt, and pepper and mix well. Pour into the crust.
Slice Camembert thinly and add to the filling. Place tart on a baking sheet.
Bake in the preheated oven until crust is golden and cheese is melted and a bit crunchy, about 25 minutes. Serve immediately.

tempeh-bacon-lettuce-and-tomato-sandwich.name: Tempeh "bacon," Lettuce, And Tomato Sandwich
instructions: Prepare marinade for Tempeh Bacon in a shallow dish, adding tomatoes along with tempeh. Cover and chill at least 2 hours or up to 4.

Preheat oven to 204°C and line a rimmed baking sheet with parchment paper. Arrange tempeh on one-half of sheet and tomatoes on remaining half in a single layer. Bake, tossing tempeh and basting with marinade after 10 minutes, until tempeh is crispy and tomatoes are shrunken and sweet, 30–33 minutes.
Divide mayonnaise between 2 slices of bread. Top with tempeh and roasted tomatoes. Arrange avocado slices, basil, and romaine over, then top with remaining slices to close sandwich.

thai-beef-curry.name: Thai Beef Curry
instructions: Heat peanut oil over medium heat in a large wok until it sizzles. Add onion and green and red bell peppers. Stir-fry until tender, 5 to 7 minute. Transfer to a bowl.

Pour coconut milk into the wok. Reduce heat to low and simmer 3 to 5 minutes. Add lime juice, fish sauce, curry paste, sugar, soy sauce, peanut sauce, Worcestershire, turmeric, garlic salt, curry powder, garam masala, and chile-garlic sauce. Stir to combine and adjust to taste.

Increase heat to medium; stir steak and vegetable mixture into the wok. Cook until mixture has thickened and reduced and steak is firm and hot in the center, about 10 minutes. Remove from heat and top with peanuts.

the-most-royal-of-icings.name: The Most Royal Of Icings
instructions: Using an electric mixer on medium-high speed, beat powdered sugar and egg whites until white, thickened, and tripled in volume, about 5 minutes.
Add water by the tablespoonful until icing no longer holds a peak.
Divide icing into smaller bowls and color with food coloring as desired.

Note: Raw egg is not recommended for infants, the elderly, pregnant women, people with weakened immune systems…or people who don't like raw egg. For an alternative, mix 5 Tbsp. meringue powder with ⅓ cup water instead.

three-layer-caramel-cake.name: Three-layer Caramel Cake
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease three 9-inch round cake pans.

Combine flour, canola oil, white sugar, buttermilk, eggs, vinegar, baking soda, 1 teaspoon vanilla extract, and cocoa powder in a large bowl until evenly distributed, 2 to 5 minutes. Divide batter among the prepared pans.
Bake in the preheated oven until golden brown, about 20 minutes. Cool in pans about 30 minutes.

Combine sweetened condensed milk, dark brown sugar, butter, 2 teaspoons vanilla extract, and salt in a saucepan over medium heat; bring to a boil, stirring constantly until thick, 3 to 5 minutes. Cool frosting, about 5 minutes.
Remove cooled cakes from pans; spread frosting onto cake layers. Stack layers; frost top and sides.

throat-coat-tea.name: Throat Coat Tea
instructions: Heat water to near boiling in a kettle.
Put lemon slices, tea leaves, and honey into a mug. Pour water into the mug.
Steep tea until the flavor is to your liking, 3 to 5 minutes.

thyme-roasted-sweet-potatoes.name: Thyme Roasted Sweet Potatoes

ingredients.prep: peeled and cut into 1 1/2-inch thick rounds

instructions: Preheat oven to 232°C (230 degrees C).

Combine sweet potatoes, thyme, olive oil, garlic, salt, and red pepper flakes in a bowl until evenly coated. Arrange coated sweet potato slices in a single layer on a rimmed baking sheet or 9x13-inch baking dish.
Place baking sheet on the top rack of preheated oven; roast until sweet potatoes are tender and slightly browned, about 40 minutes.

tiffin-on-the-greens.name: Tiffin On The Greens
instructions: Layer ham and spinach on sandwich round.
Toss salad greens and dressing together in a small bowl until well combined.
Combine cream cheese, sour cream, white sugar, and vanilla in a small bowl; add grapes and toss until evenly coated. Sprinkle pecans and brown sugar on top; toss to combine.
Place sandwich, green salad, and grape salad in the tiffin (bento) box compartments.

tilapia-fillets-with-mango-salsa.name: Tilapia Fillets With Mango Salsa
instructions: Combine mango, marmalade, lime juice, cilantro, and green onion for salsa in a small bowl.
Mix together chili powder, pepper, and salt; sprinkle on both sides of tilapia fillets.
Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add tilapia and cook until opaque in the center and fish flakes easily with a fork, 3 to 5 minutes per side.
Serve with salsa.

tolosa-beans-with-sacraments-traditional.name: Tolosa Beans With Sacraments, Traditional Recipe
tolosa-beans-with-sacraments-traditional.original_name: Alubias de Tolosa con sacramentos, receta tradicional

ingredients.item: 1/2  kilo de alubias de tolosa o alubias negras
1/2  berza o repollo rizado (idealmente, de entre 350 y 400 gramos)

instructions: We will start by placing the beans (already clean) into a large pot with a liter and a half of water. We will also add two tablespoons of oil.
Then we will cook the beans with high heat, till the contents of the pot start to boil. If some damaged residue or grain goes up to the surface of the water, we will remove it with a kitchen spoon.
Mientras dejamos que se calienten las alubias, pelaremos la cebolla y la picaremos en cubitos menudos.
We will also wash his pepper and remove his head and open his head to remove his grains and his vein. We'll have his pulp cut into his notebooks soon.

Then we'll warm up an oil chorrit in a frying pan at medium-low heat. When hot, we will add the chopped onion and cook it with low heat for 6 minutes, stirring often. The idea is that the onion will be clear a little and that it will be toasted.
After this time, we will add the minced pepper to the frying pan and cook it for 6 more minutes.
When the beans are broken and boiled, we'll put the fire down to a minimum and let them cook for 3 hours.
Once we have had an onion and pepper cooking time, we will add the preparation to the pot with the beans.
Mientras se cocinan las alubias, calentaremos agua en otra olla (que sea lo suficientemente grande para posteriormente cocinar el chorizo en ella).
Cuando el agua de la segunda olla comience a hervir, colocaremos en ella el chorizo y la morcilla. Dejaremos que ambos se cocinen durante 15 minutos en el agua, para retirarles el exceso de grasa.
Una vez pasado este tiempo, retiraremos ambos ingredientes del agua y los escurriremos.

Then we'll wash up and scrain. We will then mince and drape it into the frying pan where we have previously cooked the onion with a tipple of clear guindilla. Do this under low fire for 20 minutes. A room with a light and a few and a few and a few and a few.
After an hour and a half after the cooking of the beans, we will add the mug, chorizo, pancet, ham bone and bacon.
To mix all the ingredients we will not use a kitchen spoon but we will move the pot, more or less how it's done while preparing a pylpil.

Once the cooking time of the beans has been completed, try them to check their consistency. If you think they aren't tender enough, you can let them cook longer (there are cooks that let them cook for 3 and a half hours, or even 4).

At this point we will also add salt. We should not add them earlier because they could help them to break their beans. Remember that once you have sewed them, to mix them we have to move the pot circular. Avoid using any spoons or spatula.
Once the beans have been mixed with salt, try them and if necessary, put them back together and mix them again.
Finally, put out the fire and let the preparations rest for at least 5 minutes.
Yo recomiendo cortar los sacramentos en trozos, para servir una parte de cada uno con cada plato de alubias. No te olvides de la berza previamente cocida.

tomato-and-stracciatella-pizzas.name: Tomato And Stracciatella Pizzas

ingredients.item: (1000 grams) all-purpose flour plus more for shaping dough
Fine sea salt plus more for seasoning

ingredients.prep: undrained, puréed or crushed by hand

instructions: Whisk flour, salt, and yeast in a medium bowl. While stirring with a wooden spoon, gradually add 3 cups water; stir until well incorporated. Mix dough gently with your hands to bring it together and form into a rough ball. Transfer to a large clean bowl. Cover with plastic wrap and let dough rise at room temperature (about 72°) in a draft-free area until surface is covered with tiny bubbles and dough has more than doubled in size, about 18 hours (time will vary depending on the temperature in the room).

Transfer dough to a floured work surface. Gently shape into a rough rectangle. Divide into 6 equal portions. Working with 1 portion at a time, gather 4 corners to center to create 4 folds. Turn seam side down and mold gently into a ball. Dust dough with flour; set aside on work surface or a floured baking sheet. Repeat with remaining portions.

Let dough rest, covered with plastic wrap or a damp kitchen towel, until soft and pliable, about 1 hour. DO AHEAD: Can be made 3 days ahead. Wrap each dough ball separately in plastic wrap and chill. Unwrap and let rest at room temperature on a lightly floured work surface, covered with plastic wrap, for 2–3 hours before shaping.

During the last hour of dough's resting, prepare oven: If using a pizza stone, arrange a rack in upper third of oven and place stone on rack; preheat oven to its hottest setting, 500°–550°, for 1 hour. If using a baking sheet, arrange a rack in middle of oven and preheat to its hottest setting, 500°–550°. (You do not need to preheat the baking sheet.)
Working with 1 dough ball at a time, dust dough generously with flour and place on a floured work surface. Gently shape dough into a 10"–12" disk.

If using a pizza stone: When ready to bake, increase oven heat to broil. Sprinkle a pizza peel or rimless (or inverted rimmed) baking sheet lightly with flour. Place dough disk on prepared peel and spread about 3 Tbsp. crushed tomatoes over dough. Tear or crumble some mozzarella over top. Using small, quick back-and-forth movements, slide pizza from peel onto hot pizza stone. Broil pizza, rotating halfway, until bottom of crust is crisp and top is blistered, 5–7 minutes. Using peel, transfer to a work surface. Spoon a few dollops of stracciatella over pizza. Garnish with crushed red pepper flakes, oregano, and olive oil. Season to taste with salt. Slice pizza. Repeat, allowing pizza stone to reheat under broiler for 5 minutes between pizzas.

If using a baking sheet: Arrange dough disk on baking sheet; top with tomatoes and mozzarella. Bake pizza until bottom of crust is crisp and top is blistered, about 10 minutes. Transfer to a work surface. Garnish pizza and slice. Repeat with remaining pizzas.

tomato-and-sweet-onion-salad.name: Tomato And Sweet Onion Salad

ingredients.item: Sweet onion (such as vidalia or maui)

instructions: Combine tomatoes, onion, basil, chives, oil, vinegar, and sugar in a large bowl; season with salt and pepper and toss to combine.
DO AHEAD: Salad can be made 6 hours ahead. Cover and chill.

traditional-cuttlefish-stew-recipe-telec.name: Traditional Cuttlefish Stew Recipe
traditional-cuttlefish-stew-recipe-telec.original_name: Receita tradicional de ensopado de chocos
instructions: Season the rattles with salt and pepper and reserve. In a pot with olive oil, saute the onions, cut into half-moons, and garlic well chopped. Add the blonde and cook until the onion becomes translucent. Add the tomato pulp and let cook some more.
Add the shocks, water with the white wine and let cook, in mild heat, for 35 minutes, or until the rattles are well cooked. If necessary, add some water.
Cut the bread into thick slices and torre them. Retrieve the salt and pepper chops and put them on a plate. Spitter with chopped coriander and serve with the slices of toasted bread.

traditional-feijoada-recipe-teleculinari.name: Traditional Feijoada Recipe
instructions: Pass the meats through water and cook them in salt-tempered water, along with the sausages. Remove from the water as they get cooked, let it cool and cut into pieces.
Descasque e pique finamente a cebola e os alhos; corte o repolho em tiras; escalde os tomates, retire-lhes a pele e as sementes e corte em cubos.

Light a pot with the olive oil, add the garlic and onion and let it saute. Add the tomato and blond and season with salt and pepper. Add the meats and cabbage and cover with some meat broth. Let it cook until the cabbage is soft.
Then add the beans and cut sausages and let it be clear. Retrieve the salt and serve hot.

traditional-mushroom-pie-of-grevena-argi.name: Traditional Mushroom Pie Of Grevena
instructions: Spread two leaves on sheet and make them at 180°C for 10 minutes, until dry and brightly browned.
Let them cool.
Melt the butter into a large pan, add some of the olive oil and add the mushrooms to a strong heat for 4-5 minutes, until they drink their liquids.
Add the onions and garlic and santé until them wilt.
Add the tomato, salt, pepper and buffo.
Boil the filling for a few minutes until it drinks its liquids.
After it cools, add the walnut and the up and mix.
Break the baked leaves.
Brush a large baking pan with olive oil and spread two leaves, also rubbing them with olive oil.
Spread the broken baked leaves in, empty the filling and cover the pie with two more oiled intermediate leaves.
Add the pie, oil the surface well and sprinkle it with water.
Bake in a well preheated oven at 180°C, in the residences for 1 hour, until the pie is well browned and unstuck.

traditional-rabbit-rice-teleculinaria.name: Traditional Rabbit Rice
instructions: Peel and pinch the onion and garlic teeth. Then take a frying pan to the fire with the olive oil the onion and garlic and let it shine a little. Cut the sausage into little pieces and join the braised. Add the rabbit and white wine, season with salt, pepper and pepper and wrap it all around. Tape and let cook in soft heat for 20 minutes.
Add the rice and thyme branch and wrap. Add the water and let it cook for 12 minutes, or until the rice is cooked. As soon as it's cooked, remove and serve.

triple-ginger-cookies.name: Triple-ginger Cookies
instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C. Line 2 rimmed baking sheets with parchment. Whisk first 5 ingredients and 1/2 teaspoon salt in medium bowl. Using electric mixer, beat sugar and shortening in large bowl until fluffy. Beat in molasses, egg, and fresh ginger. Stir in crystallized ginger, then dry ingredients.

Fill small shallow bowl with raw sugar. Using moist hands, shape 1 teaspoonful dough into ball; roll in raw sugar. Place on prepared sheet. Repeat with remaining dough, spacing cookies 2 inches apart.
Bake cookies until golden and dry-looking, about 15 minutes. Cool on sheets.

true-vanilla-ice-cream.name: True Vanilla Ice Cream

ingredients.prep: split lengthwise, or 1 tsp. vanilla extract

instructions: Combine cream, milk, sugar, and salt in a medium saucepan. Scrape in seeds from vanilla bean; add pod or add vanilla extract. Bring mixture just to a simmer, stirring to dissolve sugar. Remove from heat. If using vanilla bean, cover; let sit 30 minutes.

Whisk egg yolks and sugar in a medium bowl until pale, about 2 minutes. Gradually whisk in ½ cup warm cream mixture. Whisk yolk mixture into remaining cream mixture. Cook mixture over medium heat, stirring constantly, until thick enough to coat a wooden spoon, 2–3 minutes.

Strain custard into a medium bowl set over a bowl of ice water; let cool, stirring occasionally. Process custard in an ice cream maker according to manufacturer’s instructions. Transfer to an airtight container; cover. Freeze until firm, at least 4 hours and up to 1 week.

MAKES ABOUT 4 CUPS
Cook 1 1/2 cups halved pitted cherries, 2 tablespoons sugar, and 1 tablespoon water in a small saucepan over medium heat, stirring occasionally, until syrupy, 8–10 minutes. Remove from heat and stir in 1 tablespoon bourbon; let cool. Process custard and fold in cherry mixture just before transferring to freezer.

MAKES ABOUT 4 CUPS
Strain hot custard over 6 ounces chopped bittersweet chocolate in a medium bowl; let stand 5 minutes, then whisk to combine. Let cool over a bowl of ice water. Process custard, adding in 1 cup chopped malted milk balls at the end.

MAKES ABOUT 4 CUPS
Mix 2 teaspoons instant espresso powder into strained, hot custard until dissolved; cool over ice bath. Once custard is frozen to desired consistency in ice cream maker, gradually pour in 3 ounces melted bittersweet chocolate; process until ice cream is flecked with chocolate, 2 minutes longer.

MAKES ABOUT 4 CUPS
Once custard is frozen to desired consistency in ice cream maker, add 1 cup chopped unsalted raw pistachios; process just until combined.

tsukune-chicken-meatballs.name: Tsukune (chicken Meatballs)

ingredients.item: Sesame oil (not toasted) or canola oil

ingredients.prep: Soy Basting Sauce; click for recipe

instructions: Heat a small nonstick skillet over medium heat. Add 2/3 lb. (1 1/2 cups) ground chicken and cook, stirring frequently, until chicken is opaque and just cooked through, about 2 minutes. Transfer chicken to a plate and let cool.

Combine cooked chicken, remaining 1 1/3 lb. chicken, scallions, miso, and 2 Tbsp. oil in a large bowl. Knead with your hands until a homogenized, sticky mixture forms, about 5 minutes. Clean hands; lightly coat with oil to prevent meat mixture from sticking. Divide mixture into 16 equal portions. Roll each into a ball, then form each ball into a 4"-long cylinder. Hold 2 skewers, separating 1" apart at top to form a V shape. Insert tops lengthwise into 1 cylinder. Press meat gently to flatten slightly. Repeat with remaining skewers and meat.

Build a medium-hot fire in a charcoal grill, or heat a gas grill to high. Arrange bricks for yakitori grill. Working in batches, grill skewers, turning every minute, for 4 minutes. Brush with tare and continue cooking, turning once, for 2 minutes. Brush again with tare and grill, turning once, until cooked through, about 2 minutes longer. Serve immediately.

tuna-lasagna-with-bread-teleculinaria.name: Tuna Lasagna With Bread

ingredients.item: 1 lata pequena  tomate pelado em cubos

instructions: Descasque e pique a cebola e os alhos e aloure-os num tacho com o azeite. Escorra bem o atum, junte-o ao refogado e mexa.
Adicione o tomate pelado e a polpa, envolva e deixe cozinhar um pouco. Tempere com sal e pimenta e deixe apurar.
On a tragedy, make alternate layers of bread and prepared tune. Water with the bechamel sauce and sprinkle with grated cheese. Take it in the oven, preheated at 200

tuna-wraps-sweet-tooth-teleculinaria.name: Tuna Wraps - Sweet Tooth

ingredients.item: 2 latas  filetes atum (120 g cada) (ou latas de atum (120 g cada))
3 colheres (sopa)  polpa de tomate, coentros e alho guloso

instructions: Wash and get the lettuce leaves. Peel and cut the onion into thin half-moons. Peel and grate the carrot. Open the cans of tuna fillets, drain the liquid and reserve.

Descasque e pique o dente de alho e coloque numa tigela. Junte o iogurte grego, a polpa de tomate, coentros e alho Guloso, um fio de azeite, coentros picados a gosto, tempere com sal e pimenta e envolva bem.
Disponha por cima de cada wrap a alface, a cenoura, a cebola e um pouco de atum, regue com o molho de iogurte e tomate e enrole o wrap. Prepare os restantes de igual forma e sirva.

turkey-french-dip.name: Turkey French Dip

ingredients.item: Ciabatta or other sturdy sandwich rolls

ingredients.prep: Thai basil, and/or sweet basil), sliced scallions, mung bean sprouts, lime wedges, and sliced jalapeños (for serving)

instructions: Bring turkey carcass, scallions, ginger, star anise, cinnamon, fish sauce, sugar, coriander seeds, fennel seeds, and 4 qt. water to a boil in a large pot. Reduce heat, skim surface, and simmer until liquid is reduced by nearly half, 2–2½ hours.
Strain broth through a fine-mesh sieve into a large saucepan; taste and adjust seasoning with salt if needed.
Whisk mayonnaise and chili paste in a small bowl to combine. (If you like it extra-spicy, add more chili paste.)
Heat leftover turkey in 1 cup broth in a medium skillet until warmed through.
Assemble sandwiches with rolls, spicy mayonnaise, hoisin sauce, herbs, scallions, and bean sprouts. Serve with lime wedges and jalapeños alongside, as well as a small bowl of warm broth for dipping.

turkey-meatloaf-with-chipotle-glaze-come.name: Turkey Meatloaf With Chipotle Glaze
turkey-meatloaf-with-chipotle-glaze-come.original_name: Pastel de Carne de Pavo con Glaseado de Chipotle

ingredients.item: 1 1 / 2 lb ground meat of gennie- or ® turkey

instructions: It purifies the oven to 180 been 3 been (182 been 3 been) and grease a baking source.

In a large bowl, mix the ground turkey with frosted carrot, minced garlic, oatmeal, mustard, oregano, cumin, salt, half of the soya sauce and 2 tablespoons of ketchup. Mix well till all ingredients are fully integrated.
Pasa la mezcla a la fuente engrasada, presionando ligeramente para darle forma de pastel de carne. Hornea durante 45 minutos.
While baking the cake, mix the remaining ketchup with soy sauce and chipotle chiles with adobo sauce.

When they have been put up to 15 minutes, get the meat cake out of the oven and get rid of the excess of fluids. Unite the top with chipotle frying and add onion and jalapeno cuts. Go back to the oven and baker for another 15 minutes.
Sirve caliente y disfruta de este pastel de carne de pavo con un toque ahumado y ligeramente picante.

turkey-soup-with-chopped-eggs-teleculina.name: Turkey Soup With Chopped Eggs
turkey-soup-with-chopped-eggs-teleculina.original_name: Canja de peru com ovos picados
instructions: Peel and wash the onion and garlic teeth and cut the onion in rooms. Cook the turkey in a pot with seasoned water with salt and pepper, onion, garlic and olive oil. On the side, cook the eggs, boil them for 12 minutes and then put them in cold water to cool.

Take off the turkey, let it squirm, reject its skins and bones and finely challenge it. Pass the broth of the cooking through a hammock, lie back in the pan, add more water if necessary until you make 1.2 l, take it to the fire and let it boil.
Add the turkey, pasta and some mint, retrieve the seasonings and let it boil until the dough is soft. Remove from the fire, add the boiled eggs chopped and serve hot.

tuscan-porterhouse-steak-with-red-wine-p.name: Tuscan Porterhouse Steak With Red Wine-peppercorn Jus
instructions: Let steak sit at room temperature 15 minutes. Meanwhile, preheat oven to 232°C.

Pat steak dry and season both sides with peppercorns and kosher salt. Heat oil and 1 tablespoon of butter in skillet over medium heat until butter melts. Add rosemary, thyme, and garlic and cook over medium heat, stirring occasionally, until herbs and garlic are fragrant, about 1 minute.

Add steak and cook until nicely browned, about 3 minutes per side. Transfer skillet to oven and cook until an instant-read thermometer registers 43°C for medium-rare, about 5 minutes (or 49°C for medium, about 10 minutes).
Transfer steak with tongs to a small platter, reserving skillet, and let rest 10 minutes.

While steak rests, pour off oil from skillet, leaving garlic and herbs in skillet. Add wine and boil over medium-high heat, scraping up browned bits, until reduced by half, about 2 minutes. Add chicken broth and any meat juices from platter and boil until reduced by half, 5 to 6 minutes. Whisk in remaining 2 tablespoons butter until incorporated, then season with salt and keep warm.

To carve: Transfer the steak to a cutting board and cut meat off both sides of the bone (you should have two solid pieces of steak). Thinly slice each piece, then rearrange the slices around the bone on a platter. Drizzle with the jus.

twice-baked-potato-casserole-from-crisco.name: Twice Baked Potato Casserole From Crisco®

ingredients.item: Serving crisco® original no-stick cooking spray

instructions: Heat oven to 177°C. Coat a 2-quart casserole dish lightly with no-stick cooking spray.

Cut potatoes into quarters. Place in large saucepan. Cover potatoes with water. Add 2 teaspoons salt. Bring to a boil. Cook about 15 to 20 minutes or just until potatoes are fork-tender. Drain. Place in prepared dish.

Melt shortening in medium saucepan over medium heat. Add flour. Whisk until well combined. Gradually whisk in milk. Whisk in 1 teaspoon salt, pepper and paprika. Bring to a boil, whisking constantly. Remove from heat. Stir in sour cream, 3 tablespoons chives and 1 cup cheese. Pour evenly over potatoes. Top with remaining cheese and crumbled bacon.
BAKE 20 to 25 minutes or until bubbly and golden brown. Let stand 10 minutes before serving. Garnish with remaining chives.

twisted-pumpkin-pie-with-feta-cheese-arg.name: Twisted Pumpkin Pie With Feta Cheese

ingredients.item: 5 fresh onions finely chopped (with their leaves)
5 fresh onions finely chopped (with their leaves)

instructions: Remove a crust sheet from the package and place it on the baking pan.
Squeeze it lightly and bake for 10 minutes at 1803 Let it cool and then push it.
Heat in a large pan 4 tablespoon olive oil and sauté the pumpkin for 5-6 minutes, until it is tamed.
When dried, add the onion and some salt and sauce for 2-3 minutes.
Transfer the pumpkin mixture into an open bowl to cool.
Add pepper, mint, egg and feta cheese and mix.
Finally, incorporate the crushed leaf into the filling to draw all the liquids.
Preheat the evening to 180°C, in the air. Brush with olive oil a round baking pan of 26-28 cm.
Open the rest of the crust leaves and take one off the counter.
Brush the surface with olive oil along the long side and fold in half. Brush again with olive oil and leave small spoons of dry filling.

Wrap loosely in a roll and touch it, with the compound downwards, in the center of the baking pan 26-28 cm, turning it into a snail. Similarly, we make the rest of the leaves by turning the roll each time and growing the pie cycle.
Drizzle the whole surface of the pie with olive oil and a few drops of water.
Bake in the well preheated ocean, at 180°C, in resistance, in the bottom grill for about 50 minutes. The pie is ready when it browns all around and unsticks the whole pan.

twisted-spinach-pie-argiro.name: Twisted Spinach Pie

ingredients.item: 1 kg of village flour for pie
1 kg of spinach washed and cleaned
1 kg of village flour for pie
1 kg of spinach washed and cleaned

instructions: We start the homemade leaf for the turned spinach pie, putting flour, salt, vinegar and oil in a bowl and rub it, make them a soul.
Add water and knead until dough is removed from the bowl walls, so that it is soft and supple.
Let her rest for 30′ covered not to dry her surface.
We divide it into eight equal places.
Open with thin sticks large round and very thin leaves.
Sprinkle flour during opening.
Add olive oil over the whole surface of the leaf.
Fold one third of it on one side and one third on the other side.
Now we have a long sheet.
Add the olive oil and leave along the filling with the spoon.
Turn the edges of the roll to close it and wrap it in a minute, loose, long roll like a pipe.
Gently turn the role around like a long-skinned spindle and place it along the baking pan.
We also make the next rolls.
In the end, the baking pan will be filled with long roll rolls.
Brush them with olive oil, sprinkle with some fresh water and baking at 180.3.3. for about 50′ to brown.

two-tone-cake-argiro.name: Two-tone Cake

ingredients.item: Apple and cinnamon or honey sugar
Apple and cinnamon or honey sugar

instructions: We sift the flour.
Add the sifted flour, sugar and yeast to the mixer's bowl and mix.
Beat the eggs with milk, salt and add them to the flour.
Ferment the dough and add the soft butter to homogenize it with the dough.
Ferment until the dough is soft, shiny and unstickable.
Place it in a large bowl, cover it with membrane and let it double in volume.

4th-of-july-fruit-kabobs.name: 4th Of July Fruit Kabobs
instructions: Slice watermelon in thick slices. Cut out stars using a cookie cutter.
Skewer about 15 blueberries on a wooden skewer and 1 watermelon star on top. Repeat with remaining ingredients.
